title: Essor
description: Essor is a Minecraft mod that enhances your experience by adding a leveling system to your equipment. Make it grow stronger over time and become the most powerful entity in the world you shape.
body:
# Welcome to Essor
Essor is a Minecraft mod designed to transform your adventure into a deep and rewarding progression experience. With Essor, every tool, weapon, and piece of armor you use gains levels, grows stronger, and adapts to your playstyle. Dive into a unique progression system that lets you shape your gear and dominate the world you explore!

## Leveling system
Every piece of equipment (swords, pickaxes, armor, etc.) earns experience and levels up as you use it. The more you use it, the more powerful it becomes, with enchantment rewarding for leveling up.

## Prestige system
Once your gear reaches the maximum level, it can ascend through prestige tiers. Each prestige resets your item’s level but grants permanent bonuses and increases the maximum level before next prestige, pushing your limits even further.

## Experience Boosters
To speed up your progression, Essor introduces experience boosters specifically designed for prestige levels. These boosters help you maximize your gear’s potential and reach new heights of power faster than ever.

## Smart Balancing
The mod is designed to integrate seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft, offering a challenging yet balanced progression that enhances—rather than disrupts—the core gameplay experience.
